title: Lead Exposure Survey Tool (LEST): A Methodological Approach to Highlight Lead Poisoning
author: Al Sukaiti, Al Shuhoumi, et al.

steps.title: Why middle east and north Africa countries (MENA) demand a massive attention and standalone analysis?
steps.instruction: In the MENA region, cultural norms are unique and distinct from other compartments of the world. The MENA region has its own environment, cross-sectional adjustment, and languages (Arabic more prevalent), and it is a region that is more dominant by Islam and its values and principles.
